      Melbourne weekly price cycle

      Melbourne prices peak Tuesday then fall to a trough Sunday–Monday. Buying at the trough vs the peak can save 10–20¢/L.

      Saving tips
      Today: Monday · ✓ Good time to fill up
      Fill Sunday or Monday. Prices trough at week's end before Tuesday's reset.
      Try independents. Often 3–8¢ cheaper than major chains.
      Consider E10. 4–6¢ cheaper, works in most post-1986 cars. Check your manual.
      Drive 2km. Spread can exceed 30¢/L — a short detour pays off.
      Watch the History tab. Daily data builds a clear picture of the cycle.
      Data is ~24h delayed per Servo Saver API policy.
      Horse & Cart · Victorian Fuel Price Gazette Data: Servo Saver Open Data API · Prices ~24h delayed Not affiliated with the Victorian Government
